source_of_truth: GitHub open issues and pull requests

active_items.title: Queue state cleanup
active_items.reason: This PR introduces the queue-state snapshot and must be reviewed before its classifications are accepted.
active_items.recommended_action: Reviewer should confirm or correct the queue classifications before merge.

active_items.title: Bounded task: controller handoff reconciliation
active_items.reason: Created during controller handoff reconciliation but lacks a complete actionable Tau or phatgpt task block in the issue body.
active_items.recommended_action: Convert into a valid generated ticket or close as superseded after reviewer approval.

stale_or_superseded_items.title: Codex cloud task: classify third-party YouTube telemetry aborts in live proof
stale_or_superseded_items.reason: Telemetry classification was implemented and later repaired through merged PR and release evidence; keeping the issue open can confuse the controller.
stale_or_superseded_items.recommended_action: Reviewer or human should close as superseded or rewrite as a new specific follow-up.

stale_or_superseded_items.title: Classify expected YouTube telemetry aborts in live Pages proof output
stale_or_superseded_items.reason: A later merged path produced accepted live proof fields for network classification.
stale_or_superseded_items.recommended_action: Reviewer or human should close as superseded after confirming no unique changes remain.

stale_or_superseded_items.title: PhatGPT MVP: apply Monocle caption task
stale_or_superseded_items.reason: The caption/task proof was later represented by PR 10 and release receipts; the open PR should not be treated as the next active controller task without review.
stale_or_superseded_items.recommended_action: Reviewer or human should close as superseded or convert to a historical evidence note.

next_action.instructions: Review this queue classification. Do not close or mutate GitHub issues or PRs from this PR. Comment PASS or NEEDS_CHANGES with exact stale item corrections.

stop_condition: Do not advance to a new implementation loop until the active queue is reviewed and stale/superseded items are either approved for cleanup or explicitly retained.
